session_host_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual session_host_config_t(3)

NAME

session_host_config_t - Configuration for session host.

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/common/session/host.h>

Data Fields


int port
Port to listen on (default: 27224). const char * ipv4_address
IPv4 address to bind to (NULL for any). const char * ipv6_address
IPv6 address to bind to (NULL for any). int max_clients
Maximum number of clients. bool encryption_enabled
Enable encryption (default: true). const char * key_path
Path to server identity key. const char * password
Password for client authentication (optional). session_host_callbacks_t callbacks
Event callbacks. void * user_data
User-provided context pointer passed to callbacks. struct session_display_ctx * display_context
Display context for local frame rendering (optional, can be NULL).

Detailed Description

Configuration for session host.

Definition at line 154 of file host.h.
